title: Five Discourses on Accomplishment in Ethics, Etc. (2nd)
text:
## 6. Abbreviated Texts on the Sun

“Mendicants, the dawn is the forerunner and harbinger of the sunrise. In the same way accomplishment in ethics is the forerunner and harbinger of the noble eightfold path for a mendicant. …” “… accomplishment in enthusiasm …” “… accomplishment in self-development …” “… accomplishment in view …” “… accomplishment in diligence …”
